validation-comment: Comment must be at most 500 characters long.

validation-user-password-lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
validation-user-password-min: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

validation-user-password-uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
validation-user-username-max: Username must be at most 255 characters long.
validation-user-username-min: Username must be at least 8 characters long.
